Alias.name: SRAL Command Handler
Alias.script:
local args = matches[2] or "" local cmd = "" local rest = ""
cmd, rest = args:match("^(%S+)%s*(.*)$") if not cmd then cmd = "" end cmd = cmd:lower()
if cmd == "on" or cmd == "enable" then sral_pkg.enable() elseif cmd == "off" or cmd == "disable" then sral_pkg.disable() elseif cmd == "toggle" then sral_pkg.toggle() elseif cmd == "stop" or cmd == "silence" or cmd == "shutup" then sral_pkg.stop() elseif cmd == "pause" then sral_pkg.pause() elseif cmd == "resume" then sral_pkg.resume() elseif cmd == "info" or cmd == "status" then sral_pkg.info() elseif cmd == "say" or cmd == "speak" then if rest ~= "" then sral_pkg.speak(rest, true) else cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Usage: sral say <text>
<reset>") end elseif cmd == "braille" then if rest ~= "" then sral_pkg.braille(rest) else cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Usage: sral braille <text>
<reset>") end elseif cmd == "interrupt" then if rest == "on" or rest == "true" then sral_pkg.config.interrupt = true cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Interrupt mode: ON
<reset>") elseif rest == "off" or rest == "false" then sral_pkg.config.interrupt = false cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Interrupt mode: OFF
<reset>") else cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Interrupt mode is: " .. tostring(sral_pkg.config.interrupt) .. "
<reset>") end elseif cmd == "mode" then if rest == "output" or rest == "both" then sral_pkg.config.use_output = true cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Output mode: Speech + Braille
<reset>") elseif rest == "speech" or rest == "speak" then sral_pkg.config.use_output = false cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Output mode: Speech only
<reset>") else local mode = sral_pkg.config.use_output and "Speech + Braille" or "Speech only" cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Output mode: " .. mode .. "
<reset>") end elseif cmd == "exclude" then if rest ~= "" then sral_pkg.exclude(rest) else cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Usage: sral exclude <pattern>
<reset>") if #sral_pkg.config.excluded_patterns > 0 then cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Current exclusions:
<reset>") for i, p in ipairs(sral_pkg.config.excluded_patterns) do cecho("<DarkOrange> " .. i .. ". " .. p .. "
<reset>") end end end elseif cmd == "unexclude" then if rest ~= "" then sral_pkg.unexclude(rest) else cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Usage: sral unexclude <pattern>
<reset>") end elseif cmd == "save" then sral_pkg.saveConfig() elseif cmd == "load" then sral_pkg.loadConfig() elseif cmd == "reinit" then sral_pkg.shutdown() sral_pkg._initialized = false sral_pkg.init() elseif cmd == "echo" then if rest == "on" or rest == "true" then sral_pkg.config.echo_to_console = true cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Console echo: ON
<reset>") elseif rest == "off" or rest == "false" then sral_pkg.config.echo_to_console = false cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Console echo: OFF
<reset>") else cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Console echo is: " .. tostring(sral_pkg.config.echo_to_console) .. "
<reset>") end elseif cmd == "prefix" then sral_pkg.config.prefix = rest if rest == "" then cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Prefix cleared.
<reset>") else cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Prefix set to: " .. rest .. "
<reset>") end elseif cmd == "help" or cmd == "" then cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Screen Reader Abstraction Library for Mudlet
<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> sral on/off/toggle - Enable/disable screen reader output
<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> sral stop - Stop current speech
<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> sral pause/resume - Pause/resume speech
<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> sral info - Show SRAL status and engine info
<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> sral say <text> - Speak specific text
<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> sral braille <text> - Send text to braille display
<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> sral interrupt on/off - Toggle speech interruption
<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> sral mode output/speech - Set output mode
<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> sral exclude <pattern> - Exclude lines matching pattern
<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> sral unexclude <pat> - Remove exclusion pattern
<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> sral prefix <text> - Set speech prefix (blank to clear)
<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> sral echo on/off - Toggle console status messages
<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> sral save/load - Save/load configuration
<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> sral reinit - Reinitialize SRAL library
<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> sral help - Show this help
<reset>") else cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Unknown command: " .. cmd .. ". Type 'sral help' for usage.
<reset>") end

Script.name: SRAL - Core
Script.script:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- SRAL Mudlet Package -- Screen Reader Abstraction Library integration for Mudlet -- Uses a native Lua C module (sral.dll) to call SRAL's API -- -- Requires: -- sral_bridge.dll (Lua C module - the bridge, included with this package) -- SRAL.dll (SRAL library from https://github.com/m1maker/SRAL/releases) -- Both placed in: getMudletHomeDir() .. "/sral-mudlet/" ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
sral_pkg = sral_pkg or {}
-- Configuration sral_pkg.config = sral_pkg.config or { enabled = true, interrupt = true, use_output = true, strip_colors = true, strip_blanks = true, prefix = "", max_length = 0, echo_to_console = false, excluded_patterns = {}, }
-- Internal state sral_pkg._lib = nil sral_pkg._initialized = false
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Text Processing ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
local function stripAnsi(text) if not text then return "" end text = text:gsub("\27%[%d*;?%d*;?%d*[A-Za-z]", "") text = text:gsub("\27%[[%d;]*m", "") return text end
local function processText(text) if not text or text == "" then return nil end if sral_pkg.config.strip_colors then text = stripAnsi(text) end text = text:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") if sral_pkg.config.strip_blanks and (text == "" or text:match("^%s*$")) then return nil end for _, pattern in ipairs(sral_pkg.config.excluded_patterns) do if text:match(pattern) then return nil end end if sral_pkg.config.prefix ~= "" then text = sral_pkg.config.prefix .. text end if sral_pkg.config.max_length > 0 and #text > sral_pkg.config.max_length then text = text:sub(1, sral_pkg.config.max_length) end return text end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Logging ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
local function sralEcho(msg) local formatted = "[SRAL] " .. msg .. "\n" if sral_pkg.config.echo_to_console then cecho("<DarkOrange>" .. formatted .. "<reset>") end debugc(formatted) end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Engine Name Lookup ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
sral_pkg.ENGINE_NAMES = { [0] = "None", [2] = "NVDA", [4] = "JAWS", [8] = "ZDSR", [16] = "Narrator", [32] = "UIA", [64] = "SAPI", [128] = "Speech Dispatcher", [256] = "NSSpeech", [512] = "VoiceOver", [1024] = "AVSpeech", }
function sral_pkg.engineList(bitmask) local engines = {} for bit, name in pairs(sral_pkg.ENGINE_NAMES) do if bit > 0 then local div = math.floor(bitmask / bit) if div % 2 == 1 then table.insert(engines, name) end end end if #engines == 0 then return "None" end return table.concat(engines, ", ") end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Library Loading ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
function sral_pkg.init() if sral_pkg._initialized then sralEcho("Already initialized.") return true end
-- Set up package.cpath to find our DLLs local home = getMudletHomeDir() local pkgDir = home .. "/sral-mudlet/" local sep = package.config:sub(1, 1) local ext = (sep == "\\") and "dll" or "so"
-- Add our package directory to the C module search path local pattern = pkgDir .. "?." .. ext if not package.cpath:find(pkgDir, 1, true) then package.cpath = pattern .. ";" .. package.cpath end
-- Also make sure SRAL.dll can be found by Windows loader -- by adding the directory to the PATH if sep == "\\" then local path = os.getenv("PATH") or "" if not path:find(pkgDir, 1, true) then -- Use os.execute to set PATH for this process (Windows) -- Actually, we can't easily modify PATH from Lua. -- Instead, we'll pass the full path to sral.load() end end
-- Try to load the C module local ok, lib = pcall(require, "sral_bridge") if not ok then sralEcho("Failed to load sral_bridge C module: " .. tostring(lib)) sralEcho("Make sure sral_bridge.dll is in: " .. pkgDir) return false end sral_pkg._lib = lib
-- Load the actual SRAL library local sral_dll_path = pkgDir .. "SRAL." .. ext local loaded, err = lib.load(sral_dll_path) if not loaded then -- Try without full path (system search) loaded, err = lib.load("SRAL." .. ext) if not loaded then sralEcho("Failed to load SRAL library: " .. tostring(err)) sralEcho("Make sure SRAL.dll is in: " .. pkgDir) return false end end sralEcho("SRAL library loaded.")
-- Initialize SRAL local result = lib.initialize(0) if not result then sralEcho("SRAL_Initialize returned false. No screen reader engines found.") end sral_pkg._initialized = true
-- Report engine info local engine = lib.get_current_engine() local engineName = lib.get_engine_name(engine) sralEcho("Current engine: " .. engineName) local available = lib.get_available_engines() sralEcho("Available engines: " .. sral_pkg.engineList(available))
return true end
function sral_pkg.shutdown() if sral_pkg._initialized and sral_pkg._lib then sral_pkg._lib.uninitialize() sral_pkg._initialized = false sralEcho("SRAL shut down.") end end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Public API ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
function sral_pkg.speak(text, interrupt) if not sral_pkg._initialized or not sral_pkg._lib then return false end if not sral_pkg.config.enabled then return false end text = processText(text) if not text then return false end if interrupt == nil then interrupt = sral_pkg.config.interrupt end if sral_pkg.config.use_output then return sral_pkg._lib.output(text, interrupt) else return sral_pkg._lib.speak(text, interrupt) end end
function sral_pkg.braille(text) if not sral_pkg._initialized or not sral_pkg._lib then return false end if not sral_pkg.config.enabled then return false end text = processText(text) if not text then return false end return sral_pkg._lib.braille(text) end
function sral_pkg.output(text, interrupt) if not sral_pkg._initialized or not sral_pkg._lib then return false end if not sral_pkg.config.enabled then return false end text = processText(text) if not text then return false end if interrupt == nil then interrupt = sral_pkg.config.interrupt end return sral_pkg._lib.output(text, interrupt) end
function sral_pkg.stop() if not sral_pkg._initialized or not sral_pkg._lib then return false end return sral_pkg._lib.stop_speech() end
function sral_pkg.pause() if not sral_pkg._initialized or not sral_pkg._lib then return false end return sral_pkg._lib.pause_speech() end
function sral_pkg.resume() if not sral_pkg._initialized or not sral_pkg._lib then return false end return sral_pkg._lib.resume_speech() end
function sral_pkg.isSpeaking() if not sral_pkg._initialized or not sral_pkg._lib then return false end return sral_pkg._lib.is_speaking() end
function sral_pkg.info() if not sral_pkg._initialized or not sral_pkg._lib then cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Not initialized.\n<reset>") return end local lib = sral_pkg._lib local engine = lib.get_current_engine() local engineName = lib.get_engine_name(engine) local available = lib.get_available_engines() local active = lib.get_active_engines() cecho("<DarkOrange>[SRAL] Status:\n<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> Enabled: " .. tostring(sral_pkg.config.enabled) .. "\n<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> Interrupt: " .. tostring(sral_pkg.config.interrupt) .. "\n<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> Mode: " .. (sral_pkg.config.use_output and "Speech + Braille" or "Speech only") .. "\n<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> Engine: " .. engineName .. " (ID: " .. engine .. ")\n<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> Available: " .. sral_pkg.engineList(available) .. "\n<reset>") cecho("<DarkOrange> Active: " .. sral_pkg.engineList(active) .. "\n<reset>") end
function sral_pkg.enable() sral_pkg.config.enabled = true sralEcho("Screen reader output enabled.") sral_pkg.speak("SRAL enabled.", true) end
function sral_pkg.disable() sral_pkg.speak("SRAL disabled.", true) sral_pkg.config.enabled = false sralEcho("Screen reader output disabled.") end
function sral_pkg.toggle() if sral_pkg.config.enabled then sral_pkg.disable() else sral_pkg.enable() end end
function sral_pkg.exclude(pattern) table.insert(sral_pkg.config.excluded_patterns, pattern) sralEcho("Added exclusion: " .. pattern) end
function sral_pkg.unexclude(pattern) for i, p in ipairs(sral_pkg.config.excluded_patterns) do if p == pattern then table.remove(sral_pkg.config.excluded_patterns, i) sralEcho("Removed exclusion: " .. pattern) return end end sralEcho("Pattern not found: " .. pattern) end
function sral_pkg.saveConfig() local path = getMudletHomeDir() .. "/sral_config.lua" table.save(path, sral_pkg.config) sralEcho("Configuration saved.") end
function sral_pkg.loadConfig() local path = getMudletHomeDir() .. "/sral_config.lua" local loaded = {} if io.open(path, "r") then table.load(path, loaded) for k, v in pairs(loaded) do sral_pkg.config[k] = v end sralEcho("Configuration loaded.") end end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Trigger Handler ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
function sral_pkg.onLine() if not sral_pkg._initialized or not sral_pkg.config.enabled then return end local text = line if text then sral_pkg.speak(text) end end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Lifecycle ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
function sral_pkg.onLoad() sralEcho("Loading SRAL Mudlet package...") sral_pkg.loadConfig() if sral_pkg.init() then sralEcho("SRAL ready. Type 'sral help' for commands.") else cecho("<red>[SRAL] Failed to initialize. Check the error console (Ctrl+D).\n<reset>") cecho("<red>[SRAL] Put both sral_bridge.dll and SRAL.dll in: " .. getMudletHomeDir() .. "/sral-mudlet/\n<reset>") end end
function sral_pkg.onExit() sral_pkg.saveConfig() sral_pkg.shutdown() end
-- Auto-initialize sral_pkg.onLoad()

Script.name: SRAL - Event Handlers
Script.script: function sralEventHandler(event, ...) if event == "sysLoadEvent" then if not sral_pkg._initialized then sral_pkg.onLoad() end elseif event == "sysExitEvent" then sral_pkg.onExit() end end
